dct_title_s: Frisiae antiquissimae trans Rhenu Provinc et adiacentium regionum nova et exacta descriptio
dct_alternative_sm: Frisiae antiqvissimae trans Rhenv Provinc et adiacentivm regionvm nova et exacta descriptio
dct_description_sm: Plate XXXII from Speculum orbis terrarum, part 2, Antwerpen, 1578.
From De Jode's Speculum orbis terrarum, Antwerp, first published in 1578.
